<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no"/>
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"/>
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent"/>
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Martelinho"/>
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#0a1628"/>
  <title>Jonatan — Martelinho de Ouro</title>
  <style>
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:"Segoe UI",system-ui,sans-serif;background:#f1f5f9;min-height:100vh}
    .pg{max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;min-height:100vh;padding-bottom:40px}
    .hd{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0a1628 0%,#1a3a6e 100%);padding:18px 16px 14px;border-bottom:2px solid #c9a84c}
    .hd-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
    .hd-logo{width:52px;height:52px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:8px}
    .hd-nome{font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;letter-spacing:1px}
    .hd-sub{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#c9a84c;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase}
    .hd-div{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#c9a84c,transparent);margin:10px 0 6px}
    .hd-txt{font-size:13px;color:#b8c5d6}
    .body{padding:12px}
    .card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
    .sec-tit{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#1a3a6e;margin-bottom:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;border-left:3px solid #c9a84c;padding-left:8px}
    label{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
    input,textarea{width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:15px;background:#fff;outline:none;font-family:inherit;margin-bottom:10px}
    textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:72px;font-size:14px}
    .row2{display:flex;gap:10px}
    .row2 > div{flex:1}
    .item-serv{background:#f8fafc;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0}
    .item-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px}
    .item-num{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#b8c5d6;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
    .item-val{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#c9a84c}
    .total-box{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:#0a1628;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-top:10px}
    .total-label{font-size:11px;color:#b8c5d6;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
    .total-sub{font-size:11px;color:#dde6f0;margin-top:2px}
    .total-val{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#f0c93a}
    .btn-add{width:100%;padding:10px;background:none;border:1.5px dashed #b8c5d6;border-radius:8px;color:#64748b;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px}
    .btn-prim{width:100%;padding:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a1628,#1a3a6e);color:#fff;border:1px solid #2563eb;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:block;margin-top:4px}
    .btn-ouro{width:100%;padding:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c9a84c,#f0c93a);color:#0a1628;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;display:block;margin-top:4px}
    .btn-esp{width:100%;padding:14px;background:#fff;color:#1a3a6e;border:2px solid #1a3a6e;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:block;margin-top:10px}
    .btn-volt{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:1px solid #b8c5d6;color:#fff;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:6px}
    .btn-lista{background:rgba(201,168,76,.2);border:1.5px solid #c9a84c;color:#f0c93a;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 14px;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:700}
    .btn-red{background:#fee2e2;border:none;border-radius:6px;color:#dc2626;padding:6px 12px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-top:6px;display:block}
    .btn-x{background:#fee2e2;border:none;border-radius:6px;color:#dc2626;padding:2px 7px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}
    .btn-foto{width:100%;padding:11px;background:#eff6ff;border:1.5px dashed #93c5fd;border-radius:8px;color:#2563eb;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600}
    .badge{font-size:11px;background:#dcfce7;color:#16a34a;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700}
    .banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a1628,#1a3a6e);color:#f0c93a;padding:14px 16px;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid #c9a84c}
    .linha{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;font-size:13px}
    .rot{font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8;font-weight:600}
    .foto-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
    .foto-item{border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;background:#f1f5f9}
    .foto-item img{width:100%;height:90px;object-fit:cover}
    .foto-leg{font-size:11px;padding:3px 6px;color:#64748b}
    .vazio{color:#94a3b8;text-align:center;margin-top:40px;font-size:15px;padding:20px}
    .dica{background:#fffbeb;border:1.5px solid #fcd34d;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-top:16px;font-size:13px;color:#92400e;line-height:1.7}
    .folha{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);border:1px solid #e2e8f0}
    .folha-topo{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;border-bottom:3px solid #1a3a6e;padding-bottom:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .f-logo-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    .f-logo{width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:contain}
    .f-nome{font-size:17px;font-weight:900;color:#0a1628;letter-spacing:1px}
    .f-sub{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#c9a84c;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase}
    .f-num{text-align:right}
    .f-num-label{font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}
    .f-num-val{font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:#0a1628}
    .f-data{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8}
    .f-sec{margin-bottom:14px}
    .f-sec-tit{font-size:10px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:#2563eb;border-bottom:1.5px solid #bfdbfe;padding-bottom:3px;margin-bottom:8px}
    .f-grade{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px 16px}
    .f-item label{font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
    .f-item p{font-size:14px;color:#111;margin-top:1px;margin-bottom:0}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
    th{background:#1a3a6e;color:#dde6f0;padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:12px}
    th:last-child{text-align:right;color:#f0c93a}
    td{padding:8px 10px;font-size:13px;color:#1e293b;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9}
    td:last-child{text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:#15803d}
    .f-total td{background:#0a1628;color:#dde6f0;font-weight:800;font-size:15px;border:none}
    .f-total td:last-child{color:#f0c93a;font-size:16px}
    .f-rodape{margin-top:20px;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding-top:14px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end}
    .f-valid{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8;line-height:1.7}
    .f-assin{text-align:center}
    .f-linha{width:160px;border-top:1px solid #94a3b8;margin:0 auto 4px}
    .f-assin p{font-size:11px;color:#64748b;margin:0}
    .card-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px}
    .card-num{font-size:16px;font-weight:900;color:#1a3a6e}
    .card-em{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8}
    .card-nome{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#0a1628;margin-bottom:8px}
    .total-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:10px;padding-top:10px;border-top:2px solid #1a3a6e;font-weight:800;font-size:16px}
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="pg" id="app"></div>
<script>
var LOGO = "data:image/png;base64,";
var SPOTS = [
  {id:"frente",label:"Frente",icon:"⬆️"},
  {id:"traseira",label:"Traseira",icon:"⬇️"},
  {id:"lat_esq",label:"Lateral Esquerda",icon:"⬅️"},
  {id:"lat_dir",label:"Lateral Direita",icon:"➡️"},
  {id:"painel",label:"Painel / Instrumentos",icon:"🎛️"},
  {id:"motor",label:"Motor / Capô",icon:"🔧"},
  {id:"pneus",label:"Pneus / Rodas",icon:"⚙️"},
  {id:"interior",label:"Interior",icon:"🪑"},
  {id:"porta_malas",label:"Porta-Malas",icon:"📦"},
  {id:"vidros",label:"Vidros",icon:"🪟"}
];

var state = {
  tela:"form",
  form:{cliente:"",telefone:"",modelo:"",placa:"",cor:"",data_entrada:"",prazo:"",data_entrega:"",observacoes:"",servicos:[{desc:"",valor:""}]},
  fotos:{},
  salvos:[],
  atual:null,
  count:1
};

function moeda(c){return(parseInt(c||0)/100).toLocaleString("pt-BR",{style:"currency",currency:"BRL"});}
function somarCents(s){return s.reduce(function(a,x){return a+parseInt(x.valor||0);},0);}
function fmtData(iso){if(!iso)return"—";var p=iso.split("-");return p[2]+"/"+p[1]+"/"+p[0];}
function mascaraTel(v){var n=v.replace(/\D/g,"").slice(0,11);if(n.length<=2)return n;if(n.length<=7)return"("+n.slice(0,2)+") "+n.slice(2);return"("+n.slice(0,2)+") "+n.slice(2,7)+"-"+n.slice(7);}
function esc(s){return String(s||"").replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;");}
function hoje(){return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);}

function render(){
  var s=state, f=s.form, fotos=s.fotos, salvos=s.salvos, atual=s.atual;
  var app=document.getElementById("app");
  var total=somarCents(f.servicos);

  if(s.tela==="lista"){
    var itens=salvos.length===0?"<p class='vazio'>Nenhum orçamento salvo ainda.</p>":
      salvos.map(function(o,i){
        return "<div class='card'>"+
          "<div class='card-top'><span class='card-num'>#"+o.num+"</span><span class='card-em'>"+esc(o.em)+"</span></div>"+
          "<div class='card-nome'>"+(esc(o.cliente)||"(sem nome)")+"</div>"+
          "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Veículo</span><span>"+esc([o.modelo,o.placa].filter(Boolean).join(" · "))||"—"+"</span></div>"+
          "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Entrega</span><span>"+fmtData(o.data_entrega)+"</span></div>"+
          "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Total</span><span style='color:#c9a84c;font-weight:800'>"+moeda(somarCents(o.servicos))+"</span></div>"+
          "<button class='btn-ouro' style='margin-top:10px' onclick='verPDF("+i+")'>📄 Gerar Folha para o Cliente</button>"+
          "</div>";
      }).join("");
    app.innerHTML="<div class='hd'><button class='btn-volt' onclick='setTela("form")'>← Voltar</button><div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-top:4px'>📋 Orçamentos Salvos</div><div style='font-size:12px;color:#b8c5d6;margin-top:2px'>"+salvos.length+" orçamento(s)</div></div><div class='body'>"+itens+"</div>";
    return;
  }

  if(s.tela==="pdf" && atual){
    var o=atual;
    var tot=(somarCents(o.servicos)/100).toLocaleString("pt-BR",{style:"currency",currency:"BRL"});
    var rows=o.servicos.filter(function(x){return x.desc||x.valor;}).map(function(x,i){
      return "<tr><td>"+(i+1)+". "+esc(x.desc||"—")+"</td><td>"+moeda(x.valor)+"</td></tr>";
    }).join("");
    var obsHTML=o.observacoes?"<div class='f-sec'><div class='f-sec-tit'>OBSERVAÇÕES</div><div style='background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;font-size:13px;color:#374151'>"+esc(o.observacoes)+"</div></div>":"";
    app.innerHTML="<div class='hd'><button class='btn-volt' onclick='setTela("resumo")'>← Voltar</button><div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-top:4px'>📄 Folha do Cliente</div><div style='font-size:12px;color:#b8c5d6;margin-top:2px'>Imprimir para salvar PDF</div></div>"+
      "<div class='body'><div class='folha'>"+
      "<div class='folha-topo'><div class='f-logo-row'><img src='"+LOGO+"' class='f-logo' alt='Logo'/><div><div class='f-nome'>JONATAN</div><div class='f-sub'>MARTELINHO DE OURO</div></div></div>"+
      "<div class='f-num'><div class='f-num-label'>ORÇAMENTO</div><div class='f-num-val'>#"+o.num+"</div><div class='f-data'>"+fmtData(hoje())+"</div></div></div>"+
      "<div class='f-sec'><div class='f-sec-tit'>CLIENTE</div><div class='f-grade'><div class='f-item'><label>Nome</label><p>"+(esc(o.cliente)||"—")+"</p></div><div class='f-item'><label>Telefone</label><p>"+(esc(o.telefone)||"—")+"</p></div></div></div>"+
      "<div class='f-sec'><div class='f-sec-tit'>VEÍCULO</div><div class='f-grade'><div class='f-item'><label>Modelo</label><p>"+(esc(o.modelo)||"—")+"</p></div><div class='f-item'><label>Placa</label><p>"+(esc(o.placa)||"—")+"</p></div><div class='f-item'><label>Cor</label><p>"+(esc(o.cor)||"—")+"</p></div></div></div>"+
      "<div class='f-sec'><div class='f-sec-tit'>PRAZOS</div><div class='f-grade'><div class='f-item'><label>Entrada</label><p>"+fmtData(o.data_entrada)+"</p></div><div class='f-item'><label>Prazo</label><p>"+(o.prazo?o.prazo+" dias":"—")+"</p></div><div class='f-item'><label>Entrega</label><p>"+fmtData(o.data_entrega)+"</p></div></div></div>"+
      "<div class='f-sec'><div class='f-sec-tit'>SERVIÇOS</div><table><thead><tr><th>Descrição</th><th>Valor</th></tr></thead><tbody>"+rows+"</tbody><tfoot><tr class='f-total'><td>TOTAL GERAL</td><td>"+tot+"</td></tr></tfoot></table></div>"+
      obsHTML+
      "<div class='f-rodape'><div class='f-valid'>Válido por 7 dias.<br/>Sujeito à disponibilidade de peças.</div><div class='f-assin'><div class='f-linha'></div><p>Jonatan — Martelinho de Ouro</p><p style='color:#94a3b8'>Responsável</p></div></div>"+
      "</div><div class='dica'><strong>📱 Como salvar PDF:</strong> toque nos <strong>3 pontos ⋮</strong> → <strong>Imprimir</strong> → Salvar como PDF.</div>"+
      "<button class='btn-prim' onclick='setTela("resumo")'>← Voltar</button>"+
      "<button class='btn-ouro' onclick='novoOrc()'>➕ Novo Orçamento</button></div>";
    return;
  }

  if(s.tela==="resumo" && atual){
    var o=atual;
    var servRows=o.servicos.filter(function(x){return x.desc||x.valor;}).map(function(x){
      return "<div class='linha'><span style='flex:1;color:#374151'>"+esc(x.desc||"—")+"</span><span style='font-weight:700;color:#15803d'>"+moeda(x.valor)+"</span></div>";
    }).join("");
    var fotosKeys=Object.keys(o.fotos||{});
    var fotosHTML=fotosKeys.length>0?"<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>📷 Fotos ("+fotosKeys.length+")</div><div class='foto-grid'>"+
      SPOTS.filter(function(sp){return o.fotos[sp.id];}).map(function(sp){
        return "<div class='foto-item'><img src='"+o.fotos[sp.id]+"' alt='"+sp.label+"'/><div class='foto-leg'>"+sp.icon+" "+sp.label+"</div></div>";
      }).join("")+"</div></div>":"";
    app.innerHTML="<div class='banner'>✅ Orçamento #"+o.num+" salvo com sucesso!</div><div class='body'>"+
      "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>👤 Cliente / Veículo</div>"+
      "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Nome</span><span>"+(esc(o.cliente)||"—")+"</span></div>"+
      "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Telefone</span><span>"+(esc(o.telefone)||"—")+"</span></div>"+
      "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Veículo</span><span>"+esc([o.modelo,o.placa,o.cor].filter(Boolean).join(" · "))||"—"+"</span></div></div>"+
      "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>📅 Datas</div>"+
      "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Entrada</span><span>"+fmtData(o.data_entrada)+"</span></div>"+
      "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Prazo</span><span>"+(o.prazo?o.prazo+" dias":"—")+"</span></div>"+
      "<div class='linha'><span class='rot'>Entrega</span><span>"+fmtData(o.data_entrega)+"</span></div></div>"+
      "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>🔧 Serviços</div>"+servRows+
      "<div class='total-row'><span style='color:#0a1628'>TOTAL</span><span style='color:#c9a84c'>"+moeda(somarCents(o.servicos))+"</span></div></div>"+
      fotosHTML+
      "<button class='btn-ouro' onclick='setTela("pdf")'>📄 Gerar Folha para o Cliente</button>"+
      "<button class='btn-prim' onclick='novoOrc()'>➕ Novo Orçamento</button>"+
      "<button class='btn-esp' onclick='setTela("lista")'>📋 Ver Todos os Orçamentos</button></div>";
    return;
  }

  if(s.tela==="check"){
    var spotsHTML=SPOTS.map(function(sp){
      var temFoto=!!fotos[sp.id];
      return "<div class='card'>"+
        "<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px'>"+
        "<span style='font-size:20px'>"+sp.icon+"</span>"+
        "<span style='font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:#0a1628;flex:1'>"+sp.label+"</span>"+
        (temFoto?"<span class='badge'>✔ OK</span>":"")+
        "</div>"+
        (temFoto?
          "<img src='"+fotos[sp.id]+"' style='width:100%;border-radius:8px;max-height:180px;object-fit:cover'/>"+
          "<button class='btn-red' onclick='removeFoto(""+sp.id+"")'>🗑 Remover</button>":
          "<button class='btn-foto' onclick='document.getElementById("foto_"+sp.id+"").click()'>📷 Tirar / Adicionar Foto</button>"+
          "<input type='file' id='foto_"+sp.id+"' accept='image/*' capture='environment' style='display:none' onchange='addFoto(""+sp.id+"",this)'/>"
        )+"</div>";
    }).join("");
    var nFotos=Object.keys(fotos).length;
    app.innerHTML="<div class='hd'><button class='btn-volt' onclick='setTela("form")'>← Voltar</button>"+
      "<div style='font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-top:4px'>📷 Checklist Fotográfico</div>"+
      "<div style='font-size:12px;color:#b8c5d6;margin-top:2px'>"+(esc([f.modelo,f.placa].filter(Boolean).join(" · "))||"Veículo")+"</div></div>"+
      "<div class='body'><p style='color:#64748b;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:12px'>Registre o estado do veículo antes de iniciar o serviço.</p>"+
      spotsHTML+
      "<button class='btn-prim' onclick='salvar()'>💾 Salvar ("+nFotos+" foto"+(nFotos!==1?"s":"")+")</button></div>";
    return;
  }

  // FORMULÁRIO
  var servHTML=f.servicos.map(function(sv,i){
    return "<div class='item-serv'>"+
      "<div class='item-top'><span class='item-num'>ITEM "+(i+1)+"</span>"+
      "<div style='display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center'>"+
      (sv.valor?"<span class='item-val'>"+moeda(sv.valor)+"</span>":"")+
      (f.servicos.length>1?"<button class='btn-x' onclick='delServico("+i+")'>✕</button>":"")+
      "</div></div>"+
      "<label>Descrição</label><input type='text' value='"+esc(sv.desc)+"' oninput='setServico("+i+","desc",this.value)' placeholder='Ex: Troca de óleo'/>"+
      "<label>Valor (R$)</label><input type='text' value='"+(sv.valor?moeda(sv.valor):"")+"' oninput='setServico("+i+","valor",this.value.replace(/\D/g,""))' placeholder='R$ 0,00'/>"+
      "</div>";
  }).join("");

  var totalHTML=total>0?"<div class='total-box'><div><div class='total-label'>Total Estimado</div><div class='total-sub'>"+f.servicos.filter(function(x){return x.valor;}).length+" item(s)</div></div><div class='total-val'>"+moeda(total)+"</div></div>":"";

  var listaBtn=salvos.length>0?"<button class='btn-lista' onclick='setTela("lista")'>📋 "+salvos.length+"</button>":"";

  app.innerHTML=
    "<div class='hd'><div class='hd-row'>"+
    "<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px'>"+
    "<img src='"+LOGO+"' class='hd-logo' alt='Logo'/>"+
    "<div><div class='hd-nome'>JONATAN</div><div class='hd-sub'>MARTELINHO DE OURO</div></div></div>"+
    listaBtn+"</div><div class='hd-div'></div><div class='hd-txt'>Novo Orçamento</div></div>"+
    "<div class='body'>"+
    "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>👤 Cliente</div>"+
    "<label>Nome do Cliente</label><input type='text' value='"+esc(f.cliente)+"' oninput='setForm("cliente",this.value)' placeholder='Ex: João da Silva'/>"+
    "<label>Telefone</label><input type='tel' value='"+esc(f.telefone)+"' oninput='setForm("telefone",mascaraTel(this.value))' placeholder='(00) 00000-0000'/></div>"+
    "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>🚘 Veículo</div>"+
    "<label>Modelo</label><input type='text' value='"+esc(f.modelo)+"' oninput='setForm("modelo",this.value)' placeholder='Ex: Honda Civic 2021'/>"+
    "<div class='row2'><div><label>Placa</label><input type='text' value='"+esc(f.placa)+"' oninput='setForm("placa",this.value.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,"").slice(0,7))' placeholder='ABC1D23'/></div>"+
    "<div><label>Cor</label><input type='text' value='"+esc(f.cor)+"' oninput='setForm("cor",this.value)' placeholder='Prata'/></div></div></div>"+
    "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>📅 Datas</div>"+
    "<label>Data de Entrada</label><input type='date' value='"+f.data_entrada+"' oninput='setForm("data_entrada",this.value)'/>"+
    "<div class='row2'><div><label>Prazo (dias)</label><input type='number' value='"+f.prazo+"' oninput='setForm("prazo",this.value)' placeholder='3'/></div>"+
    "<div><label>Previsão de Entrega</label><input type='date' value='"+f.data_entrega+"' oninput='setForm("data_entrega",this.value)'/></div></div></div>"+
    "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>🔧 Serviços e Valores</div>"+servHTML+
    "<button class='btn-add' onclick='addServico()'>+ Adicionar Serviço</button>"+totalHTML+"</div>"+
    "<div class='card'><div class='sec-tit'>📝 Observações</div>"+
    "<textarea oninput='setForm("observacoes",this.value)' placeholder='Anotações sobre o veículo ou serviço...'>"+esc(f.observacoes)+"</textarea></div>"+
    "<button class='btn-prim' onclick='setTela("check")'>📷 Próximo: Checklist Fotográfico</button>"+
    "<button class='btn-esp' onclick='salvar()'>💾 Salvar sem Fotos</button></div>";
}

function setTela(t){state.tela=t;render();}
function setForm(k,v){state.form[k]=v;render();}
function setServico(i,k,v){state.form.servicos[i][k]=v;render();}
function addServico(){state.form.servicos.push({desc:"",valor:""});render();}
function delServico(i){state.form.servicos.splice(i,1);render();}
function addFoto(id,input){
  var file=input.files[0];if(!file)return;
  var r=new FileReader();
  r.onload=function(e){state.fotos[id]=e.target.result;render();};
  r.readAsDataURL(file);
}
function removeFoto(id){delete state.fotos[id];render();}
function verPDF(i){state.atual=state.salvos[i];state.tela="pdf";render();}
function novoOrc(){
  state.form={cliente:"",telefone:"",modelo:"",placa:"",cor:"",data_entrada:"",prazo:"",data_entrega:"",observacoes:"",servicos:[{desc:"",valor:""}]};
  state.fotos={};state.atual=null;state.tela="form";render();
}
function salvar(){
  var num=state.count;
  var f=state.form;
  var novo={
    cliente:f.cliente,telefone:f.telefone,modelo:f.modelo,placa:f.placa,cor:f.cor,
    data_entrada:f.data_entrada,prazo:f.prazo,data_entrega:f.data_entrega,observacoes:f.observacoes,
    servicos:f.servicos.map(function(s){return{desc:s.desc,valor:s.valor};}),
    fotos:Object.assign({},state.fotos),
    num:num,id:Date.now(),em:new Date().toLocaleString("pt-BR")
  };
  state.salvos.unshift(novo);state.atual=novo;state.count++;
  state.form={cliente:"",telefone:"",modelo:"",placa:"",cor:"",data_entrada:"",prazo:"",data_entrega:"",observacoes:"",servicos:[{desc:"",valor:""}]};
  state.fotos={};state.tela="resumo";render();
}
r
render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
